title: Stack Layout Component
description: Vertical stack layout component. Renders children in a column with configurable gap, background color, padding, and border radius.

gap.description: CSS gap between stacked children. Accepts any valid CSS length value.

bg.description: Background color of the stack. Accepts any valid CSS color value including hex, rgb, and CSS variables.

pad.description: CSS padding shorthand applied to the stack element. Accepts any valid CSS padding value (1–4 values). Use '0 0 0.75rem' to pad bottom only (e.g. when image bleeds to top/side edges).

radius.description: CSS border-radius applied to the stack element. Accepts any valid CSS border-radius value.

usage.card: Card Title Subtitle text
notes: Images inside a card-style stack should use border-radius:8px 8px 0 0 to match the top corners of the stack.
When using bg+radius, set pad to bottom-only (e.g. '0 0 0.75rem') so the image bleeds to the top and side edges.
Apply side padding (1rem) to text spans directly, not to the stack, so images remain edge-to-edge.
gap defaults to 1rem — always set gap='0.25rem' for card-style layouts with images.

setup: Full card style
